about.en: Polkadot is a multi-chain network that connects specialized blockchains called parachains. DOT is used for staking, governance, and bonding.
about.es: Polkadot es una red multicadena que conecta blockchains especializadas llamadas parachains. DOT se usa para staking (staking), gobernanza (governance) y bonding.
about.ca: Polkadot és una xarxa multicadena que connecta blockchains especialitzades anomenades parachains. DOT s'utilitza per a staking (staking), governança (governance) i bonding.
